items.title: The ceremony
items.body: Doors open at 6:00 pm. Grab a drink, find your seat, and settle in — we’ll gather for the ceremony, then carry straight into the evening.

items.title: Cocktail hour
items.body: Drinks, something to nibble, and a chance to find everyone before dinner.

items.title: Dinner & dancing
items.body: A long, generous dinner, a few toasts, and a dance floor we fully intend to wear out.
